channel.title: meditation on Sudeep's Blog
channel.description: Recent content in meditation on Sudeep's Blog

item.title: 10 days of Vipassana Meditation at Dhamma Pokhara - Before you go
item.description: So finally you are here because you’ve made a decision to take a Vipassana Meditation course at Dhamma Pokhara. That is great, you’ve made one of the best decision in your life. I have taken it from 1st of the April 2017 to 12th by A.T Khadga Karki and it was great, lifetime experience for me. In this post i will share more about Dhamma Pokhara so that it will be easier for you to plan before you go there.
